ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hydrogen_production" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval of data collection */,
  "normalized_electrolyzer_power" REAL /* Normalized power usage of the electrolyzer */,
  "hydrogen_production_kg_per_mw" REAL /* Hydrogen production in kg per MW of power */,
  "normalized_grid_import" REAL /* Normalized grid import values */,
  "normalized_renewable_input" REAL /* Normalized input from renewable sources */,
  "normalized_curtailment" REAL /* Normalized energy curtailment data */,
  "cambium_lramer" REAL /* Cambium's lifecycle emissions per MWh */,
  "life_cycle_lramer" REAL /* Overall lifecycle emissions per MWh */,
  "grid_emissions" REAL /* Grid emissions in kg of CO2 per MW */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production site */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source used */,
  "production_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of hydrogen production */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of renewable energy used */,
  "grid_energy_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of grid energy to total energy used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrogen_production_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrogen_production_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the production site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the site */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the site was installed */,
  "capacity_mwh" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the site in MWh */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind, Natural Gas) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy source */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor associated with the energy source */,
  "energy_source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the energy source */,
  "source_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission metric entry */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interval of measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production site */,
  "cambium_lramer" REAL /* Cambium LRMER emissions per MWh */,
  "life_cycle_lramer" REAL /* Lifecycle LRMER emissions per MWh */,
  "total_emissions_kg" REAL /* Total emissions in kg */,
  "emissions_reduction" REAL /* Reduction in emissions compared to previous intervals */,
  "emissions_intensity" REAL /* Emissions intensity per unit of hydrogen produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_metrics_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the interval */,
  "interval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interval */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of interval (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hydrogen production site */,
  "average_hydrogen_production" REAL /* Average hydrogen production per MW over time */,
  "total_emissions" REAL /* Total emissions produced at the site */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance is measured */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* Trend in performance (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_performance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Sensor, Manual Entry) */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Contribution of the data source to the overall data */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable metric entry */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interval of measurement */,
  "renewable_input" REAL /* Amount of renewable energy input */,
  "renewable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total energy from renewable sources */,
  "renewable_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the renewable energy source */,
  "renewable_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of renewable energy use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewable_metrics_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewable_metrics_renewable_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewable_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production site */,
  "target_hydrogen_production" REAL /* Target hydrogen production per MW */,
  "target_emissions" REAL /* Target emissions reduction */,
  "goal_period" TEXT /* Period for which the goals are set */,
  "goal_achievement" REAL /* Progress towards the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_goals_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id")
)
